title: ilex crenata var. thomsonii
intro: Ilex crenata var. thomsonii, also known as Japanese Holly, is a variety of the Ilex crenata plant that is native to China and is cultivated in Japan. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The health benefits of Ilex crenata var. thomsonii include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
